creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 6 March 2014 15:58, Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet@freebsd.org> wrote:
[...]
> Instead of empty PLIST, do we have "formal soluation" for slave port which
> do not need PLIST while its master port uses PLIST?
> Thanks!

I do not know, but maybe PLIST="" or PLIST=${NONEXISTENT} (similar to
security/sinfp and net-p2p/libtorrent-rasterbar-python) will do the
job?
